quests.title: Resource Reclamation
quests.description: Executive Director Silas has signed your first contract: secure the Coral Wetlands and harvest Cave Rats for the Cartel's raw material supply chain. Profit begins here.

objectives.desc: Harvest Cave Rats for raw materials.

quests.title: Wetland Assets
quests.description: Wetland Crawlers infest high-value tidal zones. Every Crawler removed increases the property value. Liquidate them.

quests.title: Tidal Futures
quests.description: Coral Tidal Crabs are disrupting Cartel dock operations. Their shells have market value — kill two birds with one bullet.

quests.title: Mudling Acquisition
quests.description: Tide Mudlings are digging into Cartel shipping lanes. Their mud contains trace Aethel — extract it.

quests.title: The Class Contract
quests.description: Don Vercelli sees your quarterly performance. Time to renegotiate your contract. Report to Captain Vex at Port Meridian for class specialization.

objectives.desc: Negotiate your specialization contract with Captain Vex.

quests.title: Market Expansion
quests.description: The Smuggler Jungle is an untapped market. Cartel needs forward distribution centers. Scout the jungle and establish a trading post.

quests.title: Stalker Competition
quests.description: Jungle Stalkers are competition — they hunt Cartel supply caravans. Remove the competition.

quests.title: Swamp Liability
quests.description: Swamp Rippers are a liability on the Cartel balance sheet. Write them off.

quests.title: Venomfang Futures
quests.description: Jungle Venomfangs produce venom worth 500 CS per vial on the black market. Harvest the asset.

quests.title: Golem Liquidation
quests.description: A Contraband Golem — a walking warehouse of illegal goods — blocks the main trade route. Liquidate it and seize its inventory.

quests.title: Supply Chain Security
quests.description: The Black Dock Market is the heart of Cartel commerce. Secure the supply chain — Cartel trade must flow uninterrupted.

quests.title: Smuggler Enforcement
quests.description: Black Dock Smugglers are independent operators — they don't pay Cartel commission. Enforce the monopoly.

quests.title: Hostile Takeover
quests.description: Black Dock Assassins are assassinating Cartel middle management. This is a hostile takeover attempt. Execute a reverse takeover.

quests.title: Enforcer Acquisition
quests.description: Black Dock Enforcers run a competing protection racket. Acquire their operation — whether they agree or not.

quests.title: Market Audit
quests.description: Quarterly audit of all Black Dock operations. Any unlicensed traders will be... deregistered.

quests.title: Cartel Expansion
quests.description: Multiple Enforcer crews resist Cartel authority. Break their resistance with overwhelming market force.

quests.title: Inventory Audit
quests.description: Cartel inventory discrepancies detected. Audit the missing shipments and recover the goods.

quests.title: Enforcer Crisis
quests.description: An Enforcer cartel (lowercase C) has formed to oppose Meridian Cartel. This cannot stand. Break their organization at the top.

quests.title: The Advanced Auditor
quests.description: A Resonance Echo has been interfering with Cartel communications. Audit its power and close its account permanently.

quests.title: Promotion Package
quests.description: Your quarterly performance exceeds projections. Return to Port Meridian for your Advanced Contractor promotion and bonus package.

quests.title: Asset Acquisition
quests.description: The Sunken Aethel Ruin holds Precursor assets. The Cartel must acquire them before our competitors do. First-mover advantage is everything.

quests.title: Purifier Portfolio
quests.description: Cradle Purifiers guard the Ruin's most valuable chambers. Their defense protocols are a sunk cost — write them off.

quests.title: Sentinel Assets
quests.description: Cradle Sentinels guard the Ruin's main vault. The Cartel has a saying: every locked door is just a late payment. Force the acquisition.

quests.title: Behemoth Investment
quests.description: Aethel Behemoths are living capital. Their organs trade at premium prices. Make the investment — harvest the returns.

quests.title: Leviathan Futures
quests.description: Sunken Aethel Leviathans are the ultimate commodity. Their scales are armor-grade, their blood is fuel. Monopolize the supply.

quests.title: Storm Belt Futures
quests.description: The Aethel Storm Belt is a high-risk, high-reward market. The Cartel is opening a trading desk there. Establish the position.

quests.title: Storm Serpent Commodity
quests.description: Storm Rift Serpents are a volatile commodity. Their energy cells are in high demand. Stabilize the supply.

quests.title: Leviathan Market
quests.description: Leviathans have migrated into the Storm Belt. More supply means more profit. Harvest aggressively.

quests.title: Sentinel Acquisition
quests.description: Cradle Sentinel variants have been discovered. More variety means more market segmentation. Acquire samples of all models.

quests.title: The Second Audit
quests.description: Captain Vex requires a mid-contract performance review. Defeat the Resonance Echo and prove your portfolio is Master-grade.

objectives.desc: Present your portfolio to Captain Vex.
Demonstrate ROI against the Resonance Echo.
Harvest a Behemoth as your closing transaction.

quests.title: Orbital Monopoly
quests.description: The Orbital Sentinel Command is the gateway to space trade. The Cartel will establish exclusive orbital trading rights.

quests.title: Drake Insurance
quests.description: The Ashen Drake attacks Cartel cargo ships. The insurance premiums are killing profits. Eliminate the risk factor.

quests.title: Carapace Commodity
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces shed armor plates that rival Cartel-forged steel. Corner the market.

quests.title: Behemoth Short
quests.description: Aethel Corrupted Behemoths are undercutting Cartel prices by destroying our facilities. Short their existence.

quests.title: Abyssal Market
quests.description: Aethel Abyssal Reavers carry void-touched materials worth millions. The Cartel wants exclusive trading rights. Negotiate with force.

quests.title: Orbital Security
quests.description: Rival factions are attempting hostile takeovers of Cartel orbital assets. Defend the portfolio.

quests.title: Drake Liquidation
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has returned. The Cartel board has authorized a complete liquidation. Every part of the Drake is profitable.

quests.title: Market Dominance
quests.description: Achieve total market dominance in the Storm Belt. Any competitor still operating is a market inefficiency.

quests.title: Abyssal Merger
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers are attempting a merger — with each other — to form a larger threat. Block the merger.

quests.title: Senior Partner
quests.description: The Senior Partner trial. Liquidate the Ashen Drake and two premium assets. Only Partners sit on the Cartel board.

quests.title: Black Market Deep Dive
quests.description: The Void Echo Chasm is the ultimate untapped market. Rare minerals, void-exclusive resources, zero competition. The Cartel is going in.

quests.title: Reaver Commodity
quests.description: Void Reavers drop crystallized void essence — untapped market value. Begin harvesting operations.

quests.title: Channeler Competition
quests.description: Void Channelers are cornering the void energy market. The Cartel does not tolerate monopolies — except its own.

quests.title: Abyssal Harvest
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers contain concentrated void material — the most valuable substance in the known universe. Maximize the harvest.

objectives.desc: Report harvest yield to the board.

quests.title: Behemoth Depreciation
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths are depreciating Cartel void assets. Accelerate their depreciation — to zero.

quests.title: Fragmenter Futures
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters disrupt Cartel personnel productivity. Every hour of lost work is lost profit. Terminate the productivity drain.

quests.title: Chrono Arbitrage
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths create temporal loops — time arbitrage opportunities. But they're damaging the Cartel's time-is-money principle. Eliminate the arbitrage.

quests.title: Jotunn Acquisition
quests.description: A Gigantic Jotunn sits on the largest void mineral deposit in the chasm. Hostile takeover required.

objectives.desc: Execute hostile takeover of Jotunn territory.

quests.title: Heart Market Entry
quests.description: The Shattered Heart is a new market frontier. The Cartel always enters new markets first. Establish the Cartel presence.

quests.title: Liquidating the Drake
quests.description: THE DRAKE LIQUIDATION EVENT. The Ashen Drake is the most valuable organic asset in the Shattered Heart. The Cartel board authorizes complete liquidation of all Drake assets. Raid Tier-1. Profit through liquidation.

objectives.desc: File complete Drake asset recovery sheet.

quests.title: Risk Management
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters represent unacceptable operational risk. Cartel Risk Management mandates their elimination.

quests.title: Total Market Control
quests.description: Operation Total Market Control. Eliminate all unlicensed void entities. The Cartel owns this dimension now.

quests.title: Stalker Hostile Bid
quests.description: A Void Stalker is making a hostile bid for Cartel void operations. Reject the bid — with extreme prejudice.

quests.title: Temporal Market Correction
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths are causing temporal market volatility. The Cartel requires market stability. Correct the market.

quests.title: Heart Market Share
quests.description: Seize majority market share in the Shattered Heart. Competitor liquidation required.

quests.title: Jotunn Market Cap
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns have the largest market cap in the Heart. Reduce their valuation to zero.

quests.title: Tyrant Divestment
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants hold valuable assets. Divest them — forcibly.

quests.title: Harbinger Market Entry
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger is the largest untapped asset in the void. Perform market entry analysis and prepare for the final transaction.

quests.title: Fragmenter Bankruptcy
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters are operating at a loss — our loss. Force them into bankruptcy.

quests.title: The Harbinger Deal
quests.description: THE FINAL TRANSACTION. The Abyss Harbinger has destabilized the void energy market with uncontrolled inflation. The Cartel closes this deal permanently. Defeat the Raid Boss Tier-2 entity and stabilize the market. Profit is the only law.

quests.title: Deep Infrastructure
quests.description: The Severance Faultline is rich in energy assets. The Cartel will build extraction infrastructure here. First: secure the construction site.

quests.title: Energy Asset Acquisition
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces contain compressed energy minerals. Acquire the assets.

quests.title: Tyrant Real Estate
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants occupy prime real estate on the faultline. Evict them. Cartel Development is moving in.

quests.title: Jotunn Eminent Domain
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns refuse to relocate. Exercise eminent domain — the Cartel way.

quests.title: Power Plant Acquisition
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is the ultimate power plant. The Cartel will acquire it and sell the energy at premium rates.

quests.title: Core Asset Security
quests.description: Hostile entities are depreciating Core asset values. Secure the investment.

quests.title: Behemoth Liability
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths are a liability on the Core balance sheet. Clear the liability.

quests.title: Rift Market Disruption
quests.description: Rift Stalkers disrupt Core energy markets. Eliminate the disruption. Markets must be stable.

quests.title: The Gravity Dividend
quests.description: The Gravity Titan represents the largest potential dividend in Xylos history. Whoever controls gravity controls the market. Prepare the acquisition.

objectives.desc: Eliminate Jotunn competitor for the dividend.

quests.title: The Gravity Dividend
quests.description: THE GRAVITY DIVIDEND PAYOUT. The Cartel board declares the Gravity Titan a dividend asset. Defeat the Raid Boss Tier-3 entity and claim its gravity control technology. Whoever controls gravity controls the price of everything on Xylos.

quests.title: The Prime Monopoly
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge produces the rarest materials in existence. The Cartel will hold the monopoly on all Forge output.

quests.title: Anti-Trust Enforcement
quests.description: Ancient Forge defenses are anti-competitive. The Cartel files an anti-trust motion — enforced by firepower.

quests.title: Quality Control
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths are contaminating Forge output. This is a quality control disaster. Implement immediate recall and disposal.

quests.title: Competitor Purge
quests.description: Abyssal forces are attempting to steal Forge monopoly. Purge the competitors.

quests.title: Forge Union Busting
quests.description: Jotunns have unionized around the Forge's heat sources. The Cartel does not negotiate with unions.

quests.title: Production Ramp-Up
quests.description: The Cartel board demands 300% production increase. Clear the production floor of all obstructions.

quests.title: Automaton Acquisition
quests.description: Titan Forge Automatons are superior manufacturing units. The Cartel wants them on our payroll — or destroyed.

quests.title: Proto Core Liquidation
quests.description: Titan Proto Cores are failed products. Liquidate the defective inventory and recover the materials.

quests.title: Executive Legend Trial
quests.description: The Executive Legend trial. Eliminate both Titan and Harbinger in a single operational cycle. Efficiency is the Cartel way.

quests.title: Executive Legend
quests.description: The Cartel board unanimously votes you Executive Legend. Return to Port Meridian for the shareholder ceremony. Your stock has never been higher.

quests.title: Apex Portfolio
quests.description: The Hidden Aethelgardian City is the ultimate real estate asset. The Cartel will acquire it before any competitor even knows it exists.

quests.title: Property Defense
quests.description: City defenses are holdover liabilities from previous ownership. Clear all liens on the property.

quests.title: Apex Drake IPO
quests.description: The Apex Ashen Drake is a unique asset with no market equivalent. The Cartel files for an Initial Public Obliteration.

quests.title: Apex Harbinger Acquisition
quests.description: The Apex Abyss Harbinger is the final void market competitor. Acquire — permanently.

quests.title: Apex Titan Dividend
quests.description: The Gravity Titan's third manifestation pays an even larger dividend. The Cartel always collects.

quests.title: Triple Merger
quests.description: The three Apex entities — Drake, Titan, Harbinger — represent the final merger opportunity. Consolidate the market.

quests.title: The Siphon Takeover
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is now Cartel Energy Division. Complete the corporate takeover and begin energy billing.

quests.title: World Engine IPO
quests.description: The World Engine is the most valuable asset in Xylos history. The Cartel takes it public — with us as the sole shareholder.

quests.title: Engine Activation
quests.description: Activate the World Engine. When it goes online, the Cartel will own the means of planetary production. Defend your investment.

quests.title: Final Liquidation
quests.description: The Engine flushes remaining hostile assets. Execute the final liquidation sale — everything must go.

quests.title: Void Market Closure
quests.description: The void market is saturated. Close all remaining void positions and claim final dividends.

quests.title: Tyrant Bankruptcy
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants file for bankruptcy — Chapter 7, total liquidation. Execute the court order.

quests.title: Forge Final Quarter
quests.description: Final quarter earnings report. Maximize Forge output by eliminating all production hindrances.

quests.title: Expanse Monopoly
quests.description: The Cradle Expanse is now a Cartel-exclusive market. Enforce the monopoly.

quests.title: Orbital Portfolio
quests.description: The orbital portfolio requires quarterly maintenance. Clear all orbital holdings of hostile entities.

quests.title: The Final Quarter
quests.description: The final quarter of operations. Consolidate all Cartel assets and prepare the closing balance sheet.

quests.title: Final Merger
quests.description: The final merger. Combine the assets of Jotunn, Drake, and Harbinger into the ultimate corporate entity: YOU.

quests.title: Eternity CEO Trial
quests.description: The deepest Void Echo Chasm holds the final board meeting. Defeat the Eternal forms of Titan and Harbinger. The Cartel board demands your ascension.

objectives.desc: Vote out the Eternal Gravity Titan.
Vote out the Eternal Abyss Harbinger.

quests.title: Eternity CEO
quests.description: The market has spoken. The shareholders have voted. You are now the ETERNITY CEO — the eternal majority shareholder of Xylos itself. Return to Port Meridian. Every contract. Every deal. Every liquidation. It all led here. Profit is eternal.

objectives.desc: Return to Port Meridian as Eternity CEO.
Receive the Eternity CEO charter from Executive Director Silas.
